title: austrosteenisia glabristyla
intro: Austrosteenisia glabristyla, also known as the Glabristyla vine, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Austrosteenisia glabristyla include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Austrosteenisia glabristyla can be made into infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, and are commonly consumed as teas or taken in capsule form.
